title: Sky Bastion
identity_mantra: A tactical co-op defense game about holding a floating fortress together while fending off impossible weather and worse enemies.
summary: Players defend and maintain a flying fortress while surviving enemy raids and environmental disasters. Short combat-defense phases alternate with urgent repair, positioning, and upgrade decisions that determine whether the bastion survives the next assault.
features: repair and reroute damaged ship systems
storm events that reshape each encounter
interface: Keyboard/mouse on PC. Players move, aim, repair, activate devices, and issue quick pings. Gamepad support optional after core PC controls are stable.
art_style: Stylized painted skies, chunky readable silhouettes, warm ship interiors contrasted against violent storm fronts. Reference feel: Airships, Pyre, and animated adventure concept art.
music_sound: Orchestral tension with mechanical creaks, storm pressure, and triumphant swells during survival peaks. Audio should support urgency, teamwork, and relief after successful defense.
audience: Players who enjoy co-op survival pressure, team roles, and cinematic defense fantasies.
milestones: Core movement, combat, and repair loop playable
One full mission with escalating storm phases
Polish pass on readability, VFX, and onboarding
